articles.title: Internal displacements caused by violence or conflict at record high in 2025
articles.description:
The 32.3m surpasses those caused by disasters for the first time, as 82.2m people displaced in total around world
The number of internal displacements triggered by conflict or violence around the world reached a record high in 2025, surpassing the number of disaster-driven internal displacements for the first time.
A report published by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre (IDMC) shows that by the end of 2025 there were 32.3m conflict-driven internal displacements. That is 60% higher than those recorded the previous year, and – for the first time since data collection began in 2008 – above displacements driven by natural disasters, which reached 29.9m in 2025.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Gaborone gold rush: how Botswana rose to the top of men’s sprinting
articles.description:
Country with a population of just 2.5m credits investment in young athletes for its rise but this progress is under threat
It was a fairytale ending to the World Athletics Relays in Gaborone. In the final strait, Collen Kebinatshipi surged past South Africa’s Zakithi Nene to win the men’s 4x400m relay for Botswana. The home crowd, a sea of light blue, went wild.
“It means so many things to us,” Letsile Tebogo, 22, the reigning 200m Olympic champion, who ran the second leg, told reporters afterwards. “Not just the team … but for the people that always cheer for us behind the TV. Now they had that experience to see first-hand how much effort, how much pressure, how much we give for them.”
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Weather tracker: US and Mexico brace for heatwave as deadly floods hit South Africa
articles.description:
Temperatures soar in California and Arizona, while deluge continues across Western and Northern Cape
Heat is expected to intensify across western parts of the US and Mexico this week as a ridge of high pressure pushes temperatures well above the seasonal norm. Daytime highs are forecast to reach 10-15C above average in some areas.
The US National Weather Service has issued heat advisories for parts of California and Arizona, with extreme heat warnings in force on Monday and Tuesday in places such as Palm Springs, where temperatures could reach 40-43C (104-110F). More broadly, temperatures are expected to climb into the high 30s celsius before the heat shifts eastwards towards the midwest later this week.
 Continue reading...

Moroccan searchers found the remains on Saturday in the water within a mile (1.6km) of where the soldier went missing on 2 May, the army said in a statement.

articles.title: ‘Watching us is like watching a cousin’: the online creators reshaping Africa’s news ecosphere
articles.description:
Africa is leading a change in news consumption habits  – and transforming the lives of current affairs enthusiasts
Last year Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa posted a TikTok video about South African peacekeepers in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. She explained an argument that had erupted between the South African and Rwandan presidents, then listed roles different South African groups would play in a war with Rwanda: the Sotho strategists, the Xhosa negotiators, the Afrikaner muscle. The video went viral and she racked up 100,000 followers in three days.
This breakout video enabled Jaxa to pivot from being a marketing and restaurant entrepreneur to a “professional yapper and current affairs enthusiast”, part of a group of content creators explaining the news to young South Africans who, like many of their global peers, are eschewing traditional news in favour of social media.
 Continue reading...

Voters in the Caribbean archipelago are divided over concerns about immigration, especially from neighbouring Haiti, and the rising cost of living, with significant spikes in gas prices caused by war in the Middle East.

articles.title: Drug gang attacks ‘force hundreds of Indigenous families to flee’ in Mexico
articles.description:
Violence in Guerrero state has driven as many as 1,000 households from their homes, rights group says
Hundreds of Indigenous families have been forced to flee their homes in the mountains of central Mexico by intense attacks from a local criminal group, including drone bombings, an Indigenous rights organisation said on Monday.
A gang known as Los Ardillos has been carrying out attacks in Guerrero state for years, but they started to intensify last week. Villages were subjected to eight hours of bombings on Saturday, the National Indigenous Congress said, forcing between 800 to 1,000 families to flee to other towns.
 Continue reading...

articles.description:
Discovery was made by Union Pacific employee inspecting stopped train at the yard in Laredo before it continued its journey north

articles.title: Chicago teen who pushed for parents’ release from ICE custody dies of cancer
articles.description:
Kevin González, 18-year-old who had terminal colon cancer, died shortly after reuniting with his parents in Mexico
A Chicago-born teen who advocated for his parents’ release from US immigration authorities’ custody while fighting terminal cancer has died shortly after reuniting with them in Mexico, his family has told media outlets.
The parents of 18-year-old Kevin González had been taken into Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) custody in Arizona in mid-April after they crossed the US border from Mexico without permission in an attempt to see him in Chicago as his health waned. González since then traveled to be with relatives in Mexico, and in recent days he had publicly pleaded for them to be released from ICE custody so they could be with him as he battled metastatic stage four colon cancer.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Sharp drop in ‘forever chemicals’ in seabird eggs hailed as win for regulation
articles.description:
Levels of Pfas in northern gannet eggs in Canada fell up to 74% over 55-year period of study
Levels of some of the most dangerous Pfas compounds have dramatically fallen in Canadian seabird eggs, which the authors of a new peer-reviewed study say illustrates how regulations are effective.
Researchers looked at Pfas levels in the eggs of northern gannets in the St Lawrence Seaway basin over a 55-year period. Pfas levels shot up from the 1960s through the peak of the chemicals’ use in the late 1990s and early aughts, then fell.
 Continue reading...

articles.summary: イスラエルを巡るユーロビジョンの大規模なボイコットが続き、大会の将来が問われている。

articles.title: How hotels are stopping the 'dawn dash' for sunbeds after man wins payout
articles.description: Some resorts enforce allocation rules from check-in to prevent people reserving loungers with towels in the holiday sunbed scramble.
articles.titleJa: ホテルは「サンベッド争奪戦」をいかに止めるか、男性が賠償金獲得後
articles.summary: ホテルはサンベッドの場所取り競争を防ぐため、チェックイン時から割り当て規則を適用するなどの対策を講じている。

articles.title: Another year, another controversy for Eurovision - but fans are sticking by it
articles.description: Fans are grappling with how to react to the withdrawal of Spain, Ireland and others over Israel's participation.
articles.titleJa: ユーロビジョン、今年もまた論争を呼ぶがファンは支持を続ける
articles.summary: ユーロビジョンは今年もイスラエル参加を巡る論争に見舞われているが、ファンは支持を続けている。

articles.title: Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different
articles.description: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
articles.titleJa: スティーブ・ローゼンバーグ：今年のモスクワ戦勝記念日パレードは非常に異なっていた
articles.summary: ロシアの戦勝記念日パレードが例年とは異なり、軍事装備の展示が少ない控えめなものになったと報じられている。

articles.title: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
articles.description: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
articles.titleJa: メキシコ、ワールドカップのための早期学年末終了計画を中止
articles.summary: ワールドカップと猛暑のため、学年末を7月15日から6月5日に変更する提案に対し、保護者が反発し、メキシコ政府は計画を中止した。

articles.title: Trump ally Kari Lake tapped to be US ambassador to Jamaica
articles.description: Lake thanked President Trump for nominating her, saying on social media that Jamaica "is a country I know very well, full of incredible people".
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏の盟友カリ・レイク氏、駐ジャマイカ米大使に指名
articles.summary: カリ・レイク氏がトランプ大統領による指名に感謝。彼女はジャマイカを「非常によく知っている国」とSNSで述べた。

articles.title: Tourist hotspot at 'end of the world' denies causing hantavirus outbreak
articles.description: The BBC reports from the city of Ushuaia, where experts have been sent to investigate the origins of the outbreak.
articles.titleJa: 「世界の果て」の観光地、ハンタウイルス発生源説を否定
articles.summary: ウシュアイア市はハンタウイルス発生源であるとの疑惑を否定。専門家が感染源調査のため現地に派遣された。

articles.title: BBC tests out England and Argentina's World Cup training grounds in Kansas City
articles.description: Will Grant tested out one of the pitches where England captain Harry Kane and his team will call home in Kansas City.
articles.titleJa: BBC、カンザスシティにあるイングランドとアルゼンチンのワールドカップ練習場を試す
articles.summary: BBCのウィル・グラントが、イングランド代表ハリー・ケインらがカンザスシティで使用するワールドカップ練習場の一つを体験した。

articles.title: Trump and Lula's private Oval Office meeting signals lingering strain - and effort to avoid tension
articles.description: The US and Brazilian presidents did not appear together publicly, but traded compliments after their talks.
articles.titleJa: トランプとルーラの私的な大統領執務室会談、残る緊張と衝突回避の努力を示唆
articles.summary: 米ブラジル両大統領は公の場に姿を見せなかったが、会談後には互いに賛辞を交換。両国間の潜在的緊張と関係改善への努力が垣間見えた。

articles.title: Five killed in huge fire at packed Mexico fairground
articles.description: The blaze in the south-eastern city of Villahermosa erupted during a concert reportedly attended by some 135,000 people.
articles.titleJa: メキシコの混雑した見本市会場で大規模火災、5人死亡
articles.summary: メキシコ南東部の都市ビヤエルモサで、約13万5千人が参加したとされるコンサート中に火災が発生し、5人が死亡した。

articles.title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
articles.description: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?
articles.titleJa: ハンタウイルスについて、どの程度懸念すべきか？
articles.summary: ハンタウイルスに感染した可能性のある乗客が本国送還されており、一般市民へのリスクについて議論されている。

articles.title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
articles.description: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.
articles.titleJa: 各国はハンタウイルスにどう対応しているか？
articles.summary: 英国、米国、EUは、ウイルス感染船MVホンディウス号からの帰国者に約6週間の自己隔離を要請している。

articles.title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
articles.description: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.
articles.titleJa: 世界の森林減少は鈍化するも、エルニーニョによる火災がその進展を脅かす可能性
articles.summary: 新たな分析によると、昨年の熱帯雨林の減少は鈍化したものの、科学者らは依然として急速に失われていると警告している。

articles.title: The other life of US soldier accused of betting on Maduro's removal
articles.description: The Army officer charged with using classified information to win $400,000 is also a real estate investor with rave reviews on Airbnb.
articles.titleJa: マドゥロ氏排除への賭けを問われた米兵のもう一つの顔
articles.summary: 機密情報を用いて40万ドルを稼いだとされる米軍士官は、Airbnbで高評価を得る不動産投資家としての別の顔も持っていた。

articles.title: Brazil opens investigation on Google over its AI’s impact on the journalism industry
articles.description: Commissioner Diogo Thomson considered that the insertion of generative AI has “significantly altered the dynamics of access, visibility, and monetization of journalistic content in the digital environment.”
articles.titleJa: ブラジル、GoogleのAIがジャーナリズム業界に与える影響について調査を開始
articles.summary: ブラジル政府が、Googleの生成AIがジャーナリズム業界におけるコンテンツへのアクセス、可視性、収益化のダイナミクスを大きく変えたとして調査を開始した。

articles.title: The ordeal of an undocumented Haitian migrant in the Dominican Republic
articles.description: Regaining hope and confidence rests on finding a pathway to a country where he can regain his freedom and dignity, since persistent gang violence makes a return to Haiti impossible.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国におけるハイチの不法移民の苦難
articles.summary: ギャングの暴力によりハイチへの帰国が不可能なため、ドミニカ共和国にいる不法移民のハイチ人が自由と尊厳を取り戻せる国を探している。

articles.title: The human cost of the data center push in Latin America
articles.description: In this cross-border article, Global Voices is sharing stories from several countries in Latin America where communities are pushing back against AI-driven data center development.
articles.titleJa: ラテンアメリカにおけるデータセンター建設ラッシュの人道的コスト
articles.summary: ラテンアメリカの複数の国で、AI主導のデータセンター開発に対し地域社会が反発しており、その人道的コストが問題視されている。

articles.title: Brazil: A warning on how AI and deepfakes can become an ’excessive risk‘ to women and girls
articles.description: A technical note by research center Internetlab points out that advances in synthetic image creators increase the risks of gender violence online and talks about platforms’ accountability
articles.titleJa: ブラジル：AIとディープフェイクが女性や少女に対する「過度のリスク」となる可能性への警鐘
articles.summary: ブラジルの研究機関が、合成画像作成技術の進歩がオンラインでのジェンダー暴力のリスクを高めると警告し、プラットフォームの責任を指摘。

articles.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador
articles.description: This time we take you to El Salvador, examining government claims that an AI-supported transformation of the public healthcare system will make it the most advanced in the world.
articles.titleJa: エルサルバドル、AI誇大広告が公共医療システムに到達
articles.summary: エルサルバドル政府がAIによる公共医療システムの変革を主張しており、世界で最も進んだ医療システムになると宣伝されている。

articles.title: The technological transformation of Colombia's armed conflict
articles.description: More than simply a uniform adoption of artificial intelligence, a technological innovation has emerged that is transforming the battlefield, decision-making processes, local narratives, and forms of social control.
articles.titleJa: コロンビアの武力紛争における技術的変革
articles.summary: コロンビアの武力紛争において、AIを含む技術革新が戦場、意思決定プロセス、地域社会の物語、社会統制の形態を変革している。

articles.title: When dry season never ends
articles.description: In an era marked by intense transnational mobility, the uneven distribution of rights and experiences in host communities reflects underlying dynamics of power and privilege that demand further scrutiny.
articles.titleJa: 乾季が終わらないとき
articles.summary: 国境を越える移動が活発な時代において、受け入れ側のコミュニティにおける権利と経験の不均衡は、権力と特権の根底にある力学を反映している。

articles.title: How AI is used to influence global elections
articles.description: Companies that work in political persuasion are experimenting with AI at scale to see how they can make the traditional influencing methods even cheaper, faster, more convincing, and more automated.
articles.titleJa: AIが世界の選挙に影響を与える方法
articles.summary: 政治的説得に関わる企業は、AIを活用して従来の選挙介入方法をより安価、迅速、説得力があり、自動化されたものにしようと試みている。

articles.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
articles.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域を革新する地域マイクロ水力発電所
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域で、地域主導のマイクロ水力発電プロジェクトが再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス排出削減に貢献している。

articles.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
articles.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
articles.titleJa: バッド・バニーがプエルトリコの電力網問題を世界に提起した経緯
articles.summary: プエルトリコの電力システムは2017年のハリケーン・マリア以来、度重なる危機に直面しており、停電が常態化している問題がバッド・バニーによって世界に知らされた。

articles.title: Indigenous Australians win record A$150m after billionaire mined without permission
articles.description: The Yindjibarndi people had sought A$1.8bn compensation for cultural damage and economic loss.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア先住民、無許可採掘の億万長者から過去最高額の1億5000万豪ドルを獲得
articles.summary: 先住民Yindjibarndiの人々が、文化的な損害と経済的損失に対し、無許可採掘を行った億万長者から記録的な1億5000万豪ドルの賠償金を獲得した。

articles.title: BJP leader back to head India's Assam state for second time in a row
articles.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma is seen as one of the architects of BJP's rapid growth in India's northeast.
articles.titleJa: BJP党首、インドのアッサム州知事に2期連続で就任
articles.summary: ヒマンタ・ビスワ・サルマ氏がインドのアッサム州知事に2期連続で就任した。彼はBJPのインド北東部での急成長の立役者と見られている。

articles.title: I led hikers up an Indonesian volcano - and then it erupted
articles.description: An Indonesian guide who led hikers up Mount Dukono has described the moment of Friday's eruption which killed three people.
articles.titleJa: インドネシアの火山に登山者を案内したところ、噴火が発生した
articles.summary: インドネシア人ガイドがドゥコノ山の噴火時の状況を語った。この噴火により3人が死亡した。

articles.title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook among CEOs expected to accompany Trump on China trip
articles.description: A total of 17 US executives are set to join the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.
articles.titleJa: イーロン・マスク、ティム・クックらCEOがトランプ氏の中国訪問に同行予定
articles.summary: トランプ大統領の中国訪問に、イーロン・マスクやティム・クックを含む17人の米国企業幹部が同行し、習近平国家主席との会談に臨む予定。

articles.title: Police find body believed to be of fugitive Australian shooter
articles.description: A body found in New South Wales is thought to be that of a man wanted over a triple murder.
articles.titleJa: 逃亡中のオーストラリア人銃撃犯とみられる遺体を発見
articles.summary: ニューサウスウェールズ州で発見された遺体が、三件の殺人容疑で指名手配されていた男のものとみられている。

articles.title: Philippine VP Sara Duterte impeached for a second time
articles.description: If convicted in a Senate trial, which is uncertain, she will be disqualified from running for president.
articles.titleJa: フィリピンのサラ・ドゥテルテ副大統領、2度目の弾劾訴追
articles.summary: フィリピンのサラ・ドゥテルテ副大統領が2度目の弾劾訴追を受けた。上院での有罪判決となれば、大統領選への出馬資格を失う。

articles.title: Trump's China visit set to test fragile truce
articles.description: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏の中国訪問、脆弱な停戦状態を試すことに
articles.summary: 約10年ぶりとなる米国大統領の中国訪問は、不安定な関税の停戦状態を試すこととなる。

articles.title: Buddhist monk arrested over alleged rape of teen in Sri Lanka
articles.description: The Venerable Pallegama Hemarathana Thero holds one of the most revered positions in the Buddhist world.
articles.titleJa: スリランカで仏教僧が10代少女への性的暴行容疑で逮捕
articles.summary: スリランカで、仏教界で最も尊敬される地位の一つにある僧侶が、10代少女への性的暴行容疑で逮捕された。

articles.title: Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian island
articles.description: Officials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns.
articles.titleJa: インドネシアの島で火山が噴火し、3人が死亡
articles.summary: インドネシアの島で火山が噴火し、3人が死亡した。当局は以前から活動中の火山への登山に警告を出していた。

articles.title: From trusted aide to biggest rival: Suvendu Adhikari becomes West Bengal chief minister
articles.description: A former ally of Mamata Banerjee, the BJP leader will be West Bengal’s next chief minister.
articles.titleJa: 信頼する側近から最大のライバルへ：スベンドゥ・アディカリ氏が西ベンガル州首相に就任
articles.summary: ママタ・バナジー氏の元盟友であったBJP党首のスベンドゥ・アディカリ氏が、インド西ベンガル州の次期首相に就任する。

articles.title: General Council chair outlines next steps to build on momentum from MC14 negotiations
articles.description: At the first meeting of the General Council since the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), the newly elected Chairperson, Ambassador Clare Kelly (New Zealand), reported on her consultations with members on how to continue discussions in Geneva to build upon the high level of convergence on several areas of work at MC14 held in Yaoundé, Cameroon. Members also took note of Türkiye's announcement that it was joining the growing convergence to extend the e-commerce moratorium, with many welcoming the additional progress in narrowing gaps in the discussions.
articles.titleJa: 一般理事会議長、MC14交渉の勢いを基盤とした次のステップを概説
articles.summary: WTO一般理事会議長がMC14からの進展を踏まえた今後の交渉の方向性を示し、トルコが電子商取引モラトリアム延長に合流したことを発表。

articles.title: United States notifies import surcharges, ready for WTO consultations
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Balance-of-Payments Restrictions held on 5 May, WTO members discussed the United States’ new notification regarding the imposition of import surcharges to address the country’s serious balance-of-payments deficits. The United States said the surcharges took effect on 24 February 2026 and will expire on 24 July 2026, unless extended by an act of Congress. Members welcomed the transparency of the United States and its readiness to engage in consultations in line with WTO rules.
articles.titleJa: 米国、輸入課徴金を通知、WTO協議の準備完了
articles.summary: 米国が深刻な国際収支赤字対策として輸入課徴金を導入し、WTOに通知。WTO加盟国は米国の透明性と協議への意欲を歓迎した。

articles.title: WTO members discuss action plan for cotton sector after MC14, World Cotton Day 2026
articles.description: WTO members reviewed global cotton market trends and the path ahead for the cotton sector at meetings in Geneva on 4 May. The meetings follow the high-level cotton event at the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Cameroon in March. Delegations noted commitments announced at MC14 to invest in African countries moving up the cotton value chain and stressed the vital contribution of cotton to international trade and its potential to foster sustainable development.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、MC14後の綿花部門行動計画、2026年世界綿花デーを議論
articles.summary: WTO加盟国はMC14後、綿花部門の行動計画と世界綿花デー2026について議論。アフリカ諸国への投資と持続可能な開発への貢献が強調された。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Belize
articles.description: The fourth review of the trade policies and practices of Belize takes place on 4 and 6 May 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of Belize.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策審査：ベリーズ
articles.summary: WTOがベリーズの貿易政策と慣行に関する第4回審査を2026年5月に実施。WTO事務局とベリーズ政府の報告書が基盤となる。

articles.title: Members adopt rules of procedure at first Fisheries Subsidies Committee meeting
articles.description: WTO members held the first regular meeting of the Committee on Fisheries Subsidies on 1 May 2026, marking a milestone in the implementation of the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies. They approved various decisions on the functioning of the Committee.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、初の漁業補助金委員会会議で手続き規則を採択
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は初の漁業補助金委員会会議を開催し、漁業補助金協定の実施に向けた画期的な一歩として手続き規則を承認した。

articles.title: Transparency on subsidies remains central focus of SCM Committee
articles.description: At regular and special meetings of the Committee on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures (SCM) on 30 April 2026, improving transparency through the timely and complete submission of subsidy notifications was once again a central theme of the Committee’s work. The Chair, Jungsoo Hur of the Republic of Korea, emphasized the critical importance of transparency for the effective operation of the Committee and expressed concern about the continued low level of compliance with notification obligations. He strongly encouraged members to submit their outstanding notifications as soon as possible.
articles.titleJa: 補助金の透明性、SCM委員会の中心的焦点であり続ける
articles.summary: WTOの補助金及び相殺措置委員会は、補助金通知の適時かつ完全な提出を通じた透明性の向上が引き続き中心議題であることを強調した。

articles.title: WTO opens online registration for 2026 Public Forum, launches call for proposals
articles.description: The WTO has opened online registration for this year’s Public Forum, titled Powering the Future, which will take place at the WTO premises in Geneva from 15 to 17 September. It has also launched a call for proposals for the event, which this year will focus on services trade.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年公開フォーラムのオンライン登録を開始、提案募集も開始
articles.summary: WTOが「未来を動かす」と題した2026年公開フォーラムのオンライン登録と提案募集を開始。今年の焦点はサービス貿易。

articles.title: Canada commits CAD 500,000 to strengthen food safety and plant and animal health capacity
articles.description: Canada is providing CAD 500,000 (approximately CHF 286,000) to the Standards and Trade Development Facility (STDF) to strengthen sanitary and phytosanitary (SPS) capacity of public and private sector stakeholders in developing and least-developed countries. The contribution will support STDF activities that help countries meet international food safety and plant and animal health standards and facilitate safe trade, based on the STDF Strategy for 2025-2030.
articles.titleJa: カナダ、食品安全と植物・動物衛生能力強化のため50万CADを拠出
articles.summary: カナダが開発途上国の食品安全および植物・動物衛生能力強化のため、規格・貿易開発促進機構に50万カナダドルを拠出すると発表した。

articles.title: Members review notifications, anti-dumping actions at regular spring meeting of Committee
articles.description: The WTO’s Committee on Anti-Dumping Practices met on 28 April 2026 to review members’ latest notifications of new, amended or previously reviewed anti-dumping laws and regulations as well as reports on anti-dumping actions.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、委員会の春季定例会議で通知とアンチダンピング措置を審査
articles.summary: WTOアンチダンピング措置委員会が春季定例会議で、加盟国からの最新の法規通知とアンチダンピング措置に関する報告書を審査。

articles.title: WTO members review safeguard actions, exchange views on measures affecting steel products
articles.description: At a meeting on 27 April, the WTO Committee on Safeguards reviewed safeguard actions covering 38 products, 12 of which were steel/metal products. These actions were notified by members since the Committee's last meeting in October 2025. Several members expressed their views on the European Union's and the United Kingdom's actions concerning steel products. The EU investigation on grain-oriented electrical steel and measure on ferro-alloying elements also generated interventions by several members. The outgoing Chair, Ms Milagros Miranda Rojas (Peru), thanked members for their participation in the Committee.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、セーフガード措置を審査し、鉄鋼製品に影響を与える措置について意見交換
articles.summary: WTOセーフガード委員会がセーフガード措置を審査し、鉄鋼製品に関する欧州連合および英国の措置について意見交換。ペルー出身の議長が感謝を表明。
